definition: The practice of recording chronological records of user activities, system events, and data changes within a software platform for security monitoring and compliance purposes.
extendedDefinition: The practice of recording chronological records of user activities, system events, and data changes within a software platform for security monitoring and compliance purposes.
description: Audit Logging. The practice of recording chronological records of user activities, system events, and data changes within a software platform for security monitoring and compliance purposes.
